conservative.name: My Life For Yours
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target, target must be willing to receive your protection

success.description: You defend your ally as described above
As above and both you and your ally recover 1 fatigue or 1 stress

boon.description: You and your ally may each completely recharge an Active Defence

bane.description: You and your ally each suffer 1 fatigue

sigmarsComet.description: You also gain +1 Defence while this card is recharging

reckless.name: My Life For Yours
reckless.requirements: Engaged with target, target must be willing to receive your protection

success.description: You defend your ally as described above
As above and both you and your ally recover 1 fatigue or 1 stress

boon.description: You and your ally may each completely recharge an Active Defence

bane.description: You and your ally each suffer 1 fatigue

sigmarsComet.description: Your ally's Soak Value is increased by 1 while this card is recharging
